_doc: MCP servers scoped to this repo. Committed to git (no secrets here — the vectorbtpro server inherits env vars from its launcher, which sources fx-scalper/.env).

vectorbtpro._doc: vectorbt Pro's native MCP server (vectorbtpro.mcp_server). Exposes vbt tool registry (chat, search, find, analysis helpers) to Claude Code. Registered via CONVENTIONS.md §Research loop. Launcher sources .env for API keys.
